executive_summary.finding: EGLD price decoupled from majors: -5.13% WoW vs BTC +1.22% / ETH +0.26%. Last week's +3.29σ rally was confirmed as a one-week event (z-score reverted to +0.77).

NEW PATTERN — Cross-exchange OTC funnel discovered: Binance.com 2 sent 80K+ EGLD via three routing wallets (nonces 147-180) to both UPbit OTC Desk and OTC Distribution Wallet. First observed shared OTC infrastructure on MultiversX.
Yield-chasing migration confirmed: Top 2 staking gainers (Ninja Staking +15.5K, Egld Staking Provider +14.2K) match the 0%-fee, 9%+ APR profile. Top 5 losers all in 6-8% APR range. Net ~30K rotation.
Wealth concentrating upward: Mega whales +78K, large +43K, mid -78K. Combined with flat delegator count (+22), staking growth is whale-driven re-staking, not retail.
Token holders declined for 6th consecutive week across all top-10 by holder count. xExchange 24h volume -21.5% to $74.8K. Established structural trend.
Staked ratio crossed 49.50% (+0.06pp WoW). 50% milestone now <0.5pp away.
OTC Cycle 2 closing: UPbit OTC Desk and OTC Distribution Wallet each shed ~50K EGLD (-53%). 79K returned to UPbit + 20K Cycle 3 injection started May 1.

network_health.analysis: EGLD decoupled from majors, falling 5.13% while BTC and ETH posted modest gains. Last week's +3.29σ price spike was a one-week event — z-score reverted to +0.77 (normal). Network grew normally: +3,436 accounts and +1.22M transactions over 7 days (~174K/day). Staked ratio crossed 49.50% (+0.06pp WoW), now <0.5pp from the 50% milestone. APR continues compressing slowly (8.591% vs 8.606%) as more EGLD locks into delegation. Base/topup spread (10.60% / 6.20%) narrowing further suggests the staking layer is approaching saturation.

whale_intelligence.analysis: Two major narratives this week. (1) OTC Cycle 2 endgame: UPbit OTC Desk and OTC Distribution Wallet both shed ~50K EGLD (-53%); 79K returned to UPbit and the rest distributed externally in 2K and 6K chunks to a small set of recipients. UPbit then re-injected 20K to the OTC Desk on May 1, starting Cycle 3 before Cycle 2 fully closed. (2) NEW: Cross-exchange OTC funnel discovered. Binance.com 2 sent 80K+ EGLD via three routing wallets (nonces 147-180) to both UPbit OTC desks, in identical 5,999/7,999/8,000 EGLD chunks routed within minutes of receipt. First observed shared OTC infrastructure on MultiversX — the OTC desks are NOT exchange-internal. Three previously dormant whales (Mega 985K, A 143K, C 432K) remain stationary — combined 1.56M EGLD ($6.4M) sitting idle as quasi-permanent supply sinks.

staking_intelligence.analysis: The most informative staking week in 6 runs. Two 0%-fee 9%+ APR providers (Ninja Staking +15.5K, Egld Staking Provider +14.2K) gained the equivalent of what 5 lower-APR providers (Figment, Trust Staking, Project X, MrEGLD, $BOBER) lost — a clean rotation signal. Total network stake essentially flat (+0.28%), so this is migration *within* the staking layer, not new capital. HHI ticked from 0.01889 → 0.01868 (more decentralized). Delegators flat (+22) while staked EGLD grew +40K — whale consolidation, not retail growth. If sustained 2 more weeks, regime shift in delegator behavior.

token_activity.analysis: Token holder declines now in 6th consecutive week — confirmed structural trend. All top 10 tokens by holder count lost holders (range: -50 to -200). MEX price -11.92% in one week is the steepest decline in 6 runs and underperforms EGLD's -5.13% by 6.79pp. WEGLD/USDC pair holds 45.7% of all DEX volume in one pair, confirming thin liquidity outside the main stable pair. Total xExchange volume $74.8K — down 60% from the $186K spike 3 weeks ago.

protocol_breakdown.notable_events: SEGLD-3ad2d0 ($3.91M) + SWTAO-356a25 ($1.25M). 3.4x larger than XOXNO LSD.
TVL via H-token market caps. Underlying deposits grew despite EGLD price decline.
USD TVL declined 3.6% but EGLD balance grew +1.6%. Volume contracted -21.5%.
Highest single-contract throughput on MultiversX. Non-custodial routing — TVL irrelevant.
JEXchange Lite Pool processed 2,229 transfers in 24h — first appearance with significant non-zero throughput.

defi_activity.analysis: TVL changes dominated by EGLD price move (-5.13%). xExchange's 24h volume declined -21.5% in USD terms — real activity decline, not just price. Hatom Lending grew +0.93% in USD despite the price drop, meaning underlying deposits outpaced the decline (healthy signal). The aggregator metric tells the real story: XOXNO Aggregator handled 12,181 transfers in 24h (highest single-contract throughput on the network) and OneDex 8,110 — non-custodial routing volume held up despite DEX liquidity contraction. JEXchange Lite Pool processed 2,229 transfers in 24h — first appearance with significant non-zero throughput, may warrant tracking next week.

anomalies.description: egld_price_usd reverted from +3.29σ rally last week to +0.77σ — confirms 1-week event, not regime shift.

api_quirks: /accounts/{addr}/transfers/count?after={ts} is the correct endpoint for protocol-level 24h transfer counts — NOT scrCount/transfersLast24h fields on /accounts/{addr}.
/tokens?search={ticker} filtered for 'Hatom' name prefix is the reliable token discovery path for H-tokens.
Routing wallets fingerprint: medium-high nonce (>100), near-zero balance immediately before/after receipt, identical-amount chunks (5,999/7,999/8,000 EGLD) forwarded within minutes.
key_findings: Cross-exchange OTC funnel discovered: Binance.com 2 → 3 routing wallets → UPbit OTC desks. First observed shared OTC infrastructure on MultiversX. ~80K EGLD/week.
Yield-chasing migration confirmed: Top 2 staking gainers (Ninja Staking +15.5K, Egld Staking Provider +14.2K) match the 0%-fee 9%+ APR profile flagged in prior runs.
EGLD price reverted from +3.29σ rally to +0.77σ — confirmed last week's 'one-week event' classification.
Whale tier reversal: mega +78K, large +43K, mid -78K. Wealth concentrating upward.
Token holder declines now 6 consecutive weeks — established structural trend.
Hatom Lending TVL grew +0.93% USD despite EGLD price decline — underlying deposit growth.
Staked ratio crossed 49.50%; 50% milestone <0.5pp away, breach expected within 1-2 weeks at current rate.

meta_learning.most_valuable_insight: Discovered cross-exchange OTC funnel: Binance.com 2 routes 80K+ EGLD/week through 3 intermediaries to UPbit OTC desks. The OTC desks are SHARED infrastructure, not UPbit-internal. This rewrites the OTC narrative and may explain why Bybit gained +112K EGLD last week without any visible Bybit-side inflows — Bybit may be downstream of the same pipeline.
meta_learning.top_recommendation: Validate the cross-exchange OTC theory next run by querying the OTC desks' downstream recipients (erd1f4kcxxn4, erd1tuvllxaf, erd1krmy7xld, erd142cjv2r5). If any of them forward to other exchanges' deposit addresses, the multi-hop pipeline is confirmed — major narrative finding.
recommendations_for_next_run: VALIDATE cross-exchange OTC theory: query OTC distribution recipients to see if they forward to other exchanges (Bybit, Coinbase, KuCoin).
Track yield-chase momentum — did Ninja Staking and Egld Staking Provider continue gaining? If sustained 2 more weeks → regime shift.
Monitor 50% staked ratio milestone breach (1-2 weeks at current rate). Worth a callout headline if it happens.
Investigate Hatom Lending growth (+0.93% USD despite -5.13% EGLD price) — query individual H-token supplies WoW.
Query Bybit's outflow patterns — if it loses 100K+ similar to UPbit's OTC redistribution, confirms it's downstream of same OTC pipeline.
Track new mid-whale erd1gwux8 (18K EGLD, nonce 313).
MEX z-score baseline now N=3 — needs 1 more week before z-score is meaningful.
